text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, Meisho Doto, for some reason, is
booked to compete in the shopping district's
spicy-food-eating contest...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I thought I was filling out a questionnaire,
but to think it was a sign-up sheet all along...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I sh-shouldn't... I would only be causing
everyone trouble if I leave now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I probably won't last too long, but I'll do my best.

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text: It's time to announce the contestants! First up, we have a competitor ready to turn up the heat. Bringing in the passionate fuego of her Latin heritage, it's El Condor Pasa, everyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've got the appetite and the speed to put me on
top! And I brought my own Salsa de la Vida to
further increase that picante!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Next up, she's challenging the spice with guts and
gusto! A hot-blooded sister to all, it's Hishi
Amazon!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Spicy stuff's my specialty! I'll come out on top, no
matter the contest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
And lastly... whoa there, looks like she's got a
mild case of the jitters. Her resistance to spice
shrouded in mystery—it's Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, u-um... I p-pwomise to do my besht! Oh no, I
messed up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the colorful cast now introduced to
the crowd, the competition kicks off.

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
First up on the menu is a super spicy ramen! We
had the noodles specially made with chili
peppers, served up in a bright-red broth!
Contenders, dig in!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ack?! What is this stuff?! The spice level has my
Salsa de la Vida beat by a mile! Is this real?!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Next, we're bringing in the super spicy wings! The
plate's piled up so high, you have to crane your
neck to see the top!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Eurgh! The coatin' is made completely out of chili
peppers?! My tongue's 'bout to shrivel up and fall
right off!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hm, now that you say that... I guess it's... a little
spicy? But it's really delicious!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What?! This is "a little spicy" to you?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is like torture, but you haven't even winced!
What kinda trainin' did ya do to prepare?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, no, no! I haven't trained for this in the
slightest!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm honestly just a klutz! I've always had this
problem of ordering spicy food by mistake, so I'm
used to the taste—that's all!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, looks like the tables have turned! Meisho
Doto looks cool as a cucumber, while her
competition struggles to bear the heat!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Last on the menu is a super spicy mapo tofu,
served piping hot! Who will be the one to finish it
first? We're now entering the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Adrenaline is my middle name! I'll finish this
competition with a bang and scarf it down at full
speed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, if it's speed you want, it's speed you're
gonna get! I'm talking full throttle, all systems
go—full speed ahead!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm not so good at eating quickly...
Wh-what should I do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Don't panic and go at your own pace.
Go for three times the speed!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well... if I slow down, I don't think I'll win... But,
o-okay, I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Grlagh... Nope! This is too spicy, even for me! Let
me break for five or so!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Guh... I don't wanna admit it, but I'm with her...
Please, some water!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Looks like two of our contestants are asking for a
time-out. Meanwhile—whaaaat?! You're not going
to believe this!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gulp! Aaahh... Thank you for the food—it was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto clears her plate! Her insurmountable
strength pushes her to the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I made a good call—maintaining her
pace was the answer. Meisho Doto's unbelievable
resistance to spice lands her a victory!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay... I'll s-speed up!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek! My plate! And m-my glass of water!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle! Craaaash!

text_block_list.name: Event Host
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, Meisho Doto has tipped over her dishes!
This is sure to slow her down!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I'm s-so sorry! Did I break anything? I'm
sorry!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why am I like this? My hands get all slippery
at the worst moments...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Hishi Amazon and El Condor Pasa
finish in the time it takes Meisho Doto to clean
up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you were a tough one to beat... If it weren't
for that accident, that win would've easily been
yours.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I agree. I'm gonna come back stronger next time,
so let's do this again!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow... you two think too highly of me... I
w-would be honored!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three contestants exchange handshakes.
After being deemed a strong opponent, Meisho
Doto leaves the experience more confident than
before.
